ddls:
CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat type */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Name of the habitat type (e.g., HM-small, MM-large) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the habitat type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the habitat type was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the habitat type is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quadrats" (
  "quadrat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quadrat */,
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the habitat type the quadrat belongs to */,
  "quadrat_size" REAL /* Size of the quadrat (e.g., 0.0625 m^2, 0.25 m^2) */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the quadrat (m^2) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the quadrat (e.g., coordinates) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quadrat was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quadrat was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the quadrat is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quadrat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quadrats_habitat_id FOREIGN KEY ("habitat_id") REFERENCES habitats ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mussel_populations" (
  "mussel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mussel population dataset */,
  "quadrat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quadrat the mussel population belongs to */,
  "total_mussels" INTEGER /* Total number of mussels in the quadrat */,
  "total_area" REAL /* Total area of the quadrat (m^2) */,
  "mussels_per_area" REAL /* Mussels per area (mussels/m^2) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Description of the method used to collect the mussel population data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the mussel population data was collected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mussel population dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mussel population dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mussel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mussel_populations_quadrat_id FOREIGN KEY ("quadrat_id") REFERENCES quadrats ("quadrat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical analysis result */,
  "mussel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mussel population dataset the analysis belongs to */,
  "average_mussels_per_quadrat" REAL /* Average number of mussels per quadrat */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of mussel population */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of mussel population */,
  "relative_standard_deviation" REAL /* Relative standard deviation of mussel population */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistical analysis was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistical analysis result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistical analysis result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_analysis_mussel_id FOREIGN KEY ("mussel_id") REFERENCES mussel_populations ("mussel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the researcher account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "mussel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mussel population dataset being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Description of the method used to access the dataset (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  "data_subset" TEXT /* Description of the subset of data accessed (e.g., specific columns, rows) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_mussel_id FOREIGN KEY ("mussel_id") REFERENCES mussel_populations ("mussel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "mussel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mussel population dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the version was updated */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in the new version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_mussel_id FOREIGN KEY ("mussel_id") REFERENCES mussel_populations ("mussel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "mussel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mussel population dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_mussel_id FOREIGN KEY ("mussel_id") REFERENCES mussel_populations ("mussel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "report_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the detail belongs to */,
  "mussel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mussel population dataset the detail belongs to */,
  "data_point" TEXT /* Data point included in the report (e.g., average mussels per quadrat) */,
  "data_point_description" TEXT /* Description of the data point included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_mussel_id FOREIGN KEY ("mussel_id") REFERENCES mussel_populations ("mussel_id")
)
